name: TestJoinLinETFSingleResponseEvent
title: TestJoinLinETFSingleResponseEvent
description: Adds an event of type LIN Event-triggered Frame Single Response to the set of joined events. This is a non-blocking function.

parameters.name: aETFFrameId
parameters.description: Frame identifier of LIN event-triggered frame to be awaited.

parameters.name: aAssocFrameId
parameters.description: Frame identifier of a LIN unconditional frame associated with the awaited event-triggered frame.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
